confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_7530976f-283c-4429-8522-3663b67f7938 read back as received

payload.impact: Project-locus Sites that have authored inboxes or governance memory cannot yet be coherently equipped with a useful daemon that watches Site-local inbox drops or emits heartbeat/check work through standard config. Operators are forced either to run a no-op daemon or improvise local machinery outside Narada proper.
payload.proposed_direction: Add a coherent Site-local daemon source path: either make timer sources projectable by the daemon without mailbox assumptions, or expose a config-level filesystem/inbox-drop source for Site-local authored envelopes. The source should admit inert facts and route them through canonical inbox/admission machinery rather than mailbox-specific projection.
payload.summary: While equipping the /home/andrey/src/thoughts project-locus Narada Site with a daemon, the first coherent attempt was a timer-backed heartbeat scope. The config accepted a timer source and lower layers contain TimerSource/FilesystemSource concepts, but the daemon sync projector treated the timer fact as mailbox-shaped and failed with `Unknown event kind: undefined`. We fell back to a no-op mock source to create daemon presence without pretending Site-local inbox/watch machinery exists.
payload.title: Thoughts Site daemon exposed missing coherent Site-local source path
